title: Strategies for Grant Proposal Development — Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Rone)
display_label: Strategies for Grant Proposal Development Slides (2023-02-27)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-02-27 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Strategies for Grant Proposal Development' presented by Tracy Rone, PhD (MSU School of Education and Urban Studies). Anchor session for a five-PDF resource packet that includes the CRS RL32159 grant-writing guide, Spencer Foundation field-initiated grant guidance, NSF Build and Broaden 2.0 template, Grant Solicitation Alignment Table, and a marked-up walkthrough of an NSF Build and Broaden solicitation. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/8xFMe6FcB7F6ulaxc0-lmkZI_ipgIS35lOZjdx1cLs7_wVkcg4zK-U5XwX8bb3s5.k8oEBkO1IB_bnc7M
